About Me

A data enthusiast
who builds things

I'm an Informatics student at Universitas Siliwangi with a GPA of 3.70/4.00, specializing in Data Science, Machine Learning, and Natural Language Processing. I build end-to-end ML workflows — from raw data to deployed applications — and have a particular interest in making AI tools accessible through clean, interactive dashboards.

Beyond data, I lead the Music Division at UKM Teater 28, which has shaped my collaborative spirit and my belief that creativity and analytical thinking are two sides of the same coin.

Experience

Where I've
worked

Junior Data Science Intern
VINIX7
📅 March 2026 – June 2026 📍 Tasikmalaya, Indonesia
Processed and prepared 65,543 raw records through cleaning, balancing, and transformation workflows to build model-ready datasets for machine learning applications.
Conducted Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA), feature engineering, model training, evaluation, and hyperparameter tuning using Python-based data science tools.
Developed and deployed sentiment analysis models using Multinomial Naive Bayes alongside interactive Streamlit dashboards for end-user accessibility.
Implemented model serialization using Pickle and deployed ML applications for public access via Hugging Face Spaces.
Produced technical reports and delivered analytical findings presentations to support data-driven decision-making.

Projects

Things I've
built

All Repos
🎥
01 / Featured
80% Classification Accuracy

YouTube Sentiment Analyzer

An NLP-powered application that analyzes YouTube video narrations via Whisper speech-to-text, then compares the video's sentiment with audience comments using RoBERTa and semantic similarity scoring. Features interactive charts, word clouds, and auto-generated insights — all deployed on Streamlit.

NLP IndoBERT / RoBERTa Whisper AI Streamlit YouTube API Sentence Transformers KeyBERT
View on GitHub
🚗
02
R² Score: 0.71

Car Price Prediction System

A machine learning app that estimates vehicle prices using Linear Regression on 6 key features: engine size, horsepower, wheelbase, width, length, and fuel efficiency. Deployed publicly on Hugging Face Spaces via Streamlit.

Scikit-Learn Linear Regression Streamlit Hugging Face Pickle
🤗 Live Demo GitHub
📊
03

Customer Review Sentiment Dashboard

An interactive dashboard for classifying sentiment across 10,000+ customer reviews. Built with Scikit-Learn and Streamlit, containerized with Docker. Includes live prediction, visualizations, and review filtering by sentiment category.

Scikit-Learn Streamlit Docker 10K+ Reviews
🤗 Live Demo GitHub
🚌
04

Smart Bus Occupancy Monitoring (IoT)

An ESP32-based IoT system for real-time bus occupancy monitoring, integrated with the Blynk cloud dashboard. Tracks 4 seats, calculates occupancy percentages, and triggers alerts when capacity reaches 80%. Simulated in Wokwi.

ESP32 Blynk IoT Arduino IDE Wokwi Simulator Embedded Systems
View on GitHub
